title: Remove hardcoded JWT_SECRET defaults; throw on missing
description: src/config/index.ts:41, src/config/app.config.ts:46, src/config/security.config.ts:56 each have weak default JWT_SECRET values. Remove defaults and throw if JWT_SECRET is missing or shorter than 32 chars. Also: (1) Don't trigger failed-attempt lockout for TokenExpiredError in src/security/index.ts:374-380. (2) Reduce token info in logs (src/hass/index.ts:18-20 to debug level).
validation: grep -r 'default_secret_key\|your-secret-key\|your_jwt_secret' src/ should return 0. Start server without JWT_SECRET set, confirm throw.
